summary: Video. An NBC News and NBC Nightly News sit-down interview segment titled 'ONE-ON-ONE WITH ACTING ICE DIRECTOR' in which the official speaks about locating 300,000 unaccompanied migrant children and removing children from trafficking situations. The official is shown seated and speaking to camera with a news chyron.
notable_text: NBC NEWS REPORTS / NBC NIGHTLY NEWS / ONE-ON-ONE WITH ACTING ICE DIRECTOR
